announcements.title: Portable v0.5.0 is here
announcements.body: The old Windows installer (v0.4.x) will not auto-update anymore. Download the portable build from GitHub. Your notes stay in Documents\2XKO Notes\2xko-notes.sync.json — move that file there if you still have it elsewhere.

announcements.title: Roster update
announcements.body: Senna and Thresh are now in the character roster. Keep your matchup notes fresh.
